mission.title: tikv: Use `dyn` keyword for traits objects
mission.description:
Resolves #4197.  

I use windows-gnu toolchain and there're some minor compilation problems in this crate and its dependencies. For those issues in this crate i also fixed them in separate commits. If requested i can move them off the shelf.

resolution.summary:
Thanks a lot! I really like this change, but there are few questions:
- why there is a new "code of conduct" file?
- I suggest to write your deny rule in Makefile so that you don't need to deny it in every cargo project.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
cargo build --all
cargo test --all --no-run
cargo bench --all --no-run
cargo build --all --features=no-jemalloc
cargo build --all --features=mem-profiling
